puzzleDescription: Use a 'while' loop to filter numbers. Your goal is to print all even numbers from 1 to 20.
objective: Use a while loop to check numbers 1-20. Print only the even numbers (2, 4, 6... 20).
hints: Inside the while loop, use 'if (i % 2 == 0)' to check if a number is even.
Don't forget to increment 'i++' OUTSIDE the if statement but INSIDE the while loop.
